scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON -c green,blue,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node dist/src/main.js
scripts.start: npm run migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.start:web: npm run migrate && npm run start:backend
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
